evals.prompt: Convert the two CSV files in opendata-linz/example-history to our standardized student-facing format and document the result.
evals.expected_output: Two deterministic UTF-8 CSV outputs, a strict converter, ignored source filenames, updated dataset documentation, and successful validation without overwriting unrelated changes.
expectations: Both prepared files are comma-delimited UTF-8 without BOM and have unique nonempty IDs.
The converter validates both source headers, writes atomically, and produces deterministic bytes.
The dataset README reports measured counts, missing-value semantics, direct downloads, source links, and a justified readiness status.
Exact source filenames are ignored while prepared outputs and the converter remain trackable.

evals.prompt: Prepare the public-facilities CSV for web maps. Its projected coordinate columns are confusingly named and some coordinate pairs are blank.
evals.expected_output: A converter that verifies the CRS and axis order, preserves projected coordinates, adds WGS84 lon/lat only for complete pairs, preserves unknowns, validates IDs and bounds, and documents freshness limitations.
expectations: The implementation verifies the CRS and axis order instead of inferring them only from column names.
Projected values are preserved and complete coordinate pairs receive plausible Linz WGS84 lon/lat values.
Rows with both coordinates blank are preserved with blank lon/lat, while incomplete pairs fail validation.
The README warns that operational or accessibility information can be stale.

evals.prompt: Refresh the already converted opendata-linz/example-live dataset from its official URL and update the main Open Data overview if its readiness changes.
evals.expected_output: A safe temporary download, source-schema drift check, deterministic regeneration, measured diff, accurate data-vintage documentation, central readiness update only when justified, and full web/repository validation.
expectations: The official payload is downloaded to a temporary path and inspected before replacing any local source.
Schema and data drift are measured and reported before prepared output is regenerated.
The dataset README uses the actual source vintage and the central overview changes only if the evidence changes readiness.
Determinism, strict parsing, git diff checks, and the Astro content check all pass.
